Container.Name: dd-proxy
Container.Overview: Minimal authenticated HTTP CONNECT proxy. Runs on PHATT-RAID so 2Captcha DataDome solves egress from the same Breezeline residential IP (23.245.109.252) as the obsessed scraper.

Config.Name: PROXY_PASS
Config.Description: Proxy password — use a strong random value (e.g. openssl rand -base64 18)

Config.Name: PROXY_PORT
Config.Description: Port the proxy listens on inside the container

Config.Name: Host Port
Config.Description: External port — must be reachable by 2Captcha solver IPs
